text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm lovestruck. ♪
I want to hold you close. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This is a song by my friend's favorite<n>idol. She
invited me out to sing it with<n>her at karaoke,
hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The lyrics are a little embarrassing, but<n>they're
easier to say when they're put to<n>a melody. Music
is strange like that, isn't<n>it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm lovestruck. ♪
I only have eyes for you. ♪
